channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sam Neill's Iconic Jurassic Park Moment and Legacy
item.description: The article commemorates New Zealand actor Sam Neill, who passed away at 78 after battling lymphoma. It highlights his iconic performance in 'Jurassic Park,' particularly the unforgettable scene where...

item.title: Top STEM Schools in Kenya: Ranking and Highlights for 2026
item.description: The article discusses the ranking of STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics) schools in Kenya, emphasizing their role in fostering innovation and preparing students for future careers...

item.title: Municipal officials face personal liability for R1.7bn pension shortfall
item.description: The Motor Industry Staff Association (Misa) has demanded that municipal managers, mayors, and councillors be held personally accountable for a R1.7bn pension shortfall, accusing them of stealing from ...

item.title: Junior Boks stage remarkable comeback to reach U-20 World Championship final after beating England
item.description: The South African Junior Springboks delivered a stunning second-half performance to defeat England 53-37 and secure their place in the U-20 Rugby World Championship final against France. Trailing 20-1...

item.title: Police investigating circumstances surrounding British MP's death
item.description: Australian authorities are examining the circumstances leading to the death of a British Member of Parliament following reports that counter-terrorism units believe she was attacked prior to her passi...

item.title: JMFyang's Lyric Challenge Promotes Positive Vibes and Kilig
item.description: The article highlights JMFyang's participation in a lyric challenge that emphasizes positive energy and kilig (a Filipino term for romantic or sweet vibes). The challenge, part of ABS-CBN's entertainm...

item.title: Tinubu pays tribute to Buhari’s legacy of integrity and leadership
item.description: President Bola Tinubu paid heartfelt tribute to the late former President Muhammadu Buhari, highlighting his transformation from military ruler to civilian democrat as a rare example in Nigeria’s hist...

item.title: Report Says Apple Agreed to Use Intel's U.S. Manufacturing as Part of Tariff Negotiations with the White House
item.description: According to reports citing The Wall Street Journal, Apple agreed to have some of its custom chips manufactured at Intel's U.S. fabrication facilities after discussions with the White House during neg...

item.title: Nigeria Customs Reports ₦34 Trillion in Import Duty Exemptions in 2025
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) disclosed that import duty exemption certificate approvals reached ₦34 trillion in 2025, impacting revenue generation. Comptroller-General Adewale Adeniyi explained t...

item.title: US Reinstates Iran Blockade and Imposes 20% Fee on Hormuz Cargo Traffic
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced the reinstatement of the naval blockade against Iran, accompanied by a 20% fee on all cargo transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The move comes amid ongoing tension...

item.title: ISRO Completes Critical Tests for Gaganyaan Crew Module Safety
item.description: ISRO has successfully completed three major qualification tests for the crew module systems of the Gaganyaan mission, marking a significant step toward India's first manned spaceflight. These tests, c...

item.title: Tyler Hoover's Divorce from Quynh Anh and Rebuilding His Life
item.description: The article discusses Tyler Hoover's divorce from his wife Quynh Anh, which ended their four-year marriage in late 2023. The couple, who married in 2019 after dating for a year, share a son from their...

item.title: Tanzania's Legal Aid Initiative Recognizes President Samia for Serving Over 4 Million Citizens
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has been honored by the Tanzania Public Bar Association (TPBA) for her administration’s legal aid initiative, which has provided assistance to over 4.1 million Tanzanians...

item.title: Tony Blair advises Andy Burnham on navigating UK-US relations and leadership challenges
item.description: Tony Blair has cautioned Andy Burnham about the complexities of leading Labour, emphasizing the need for strong US ties amid geopolitical uncertainties. During a discussion at the Tony Blair Institute...

item.title: Judge Condemns Trump DOJ's 'Slush Fund' and Highlights Pattern of Executive Abuse
item.description: A U.S. District Judge in Florida criticized the Trump administration's Department of Justice for its alleged misuse of a 'slush fund,' highlighting a troubling pattern of executive overreach. The ruli...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's new film 'Odyssey' announced
item.description: The article discusses Christopher Nolan's return to blockbuster filmmaking with his new project 'Odyssey'. However, the content is preceded by a technical notice from News Corp Australia regarding cra...

item.title: Oil price surge linked to Middle East tensions drives down TSX and U.S. markets
item.description: The Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and U.S. markets experienced declines on July 13, 2026, amid rising oil prices fueled by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East. The surge in oil prices, which reached r...

item.title: Spain wildfires claim lives as heatwave intensifies
item.description: A severe wildfire in Spain's southern Almeria region has resulted in at least 11 fatalities, with authorities working to control the blaze during a harsh heatwave. The tragedy, confirmed by Andalusia'...

item.title: DepEd says Cavite pupil's death was linked to septic shock from an infection as probe into deworming activity continues
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) said that the death of a Grade 4 pupil from Hugo Perez Elementary School-Annex in Trece Martires City, Cavite was initially linked to an infection that resulted in ...

item.title: Quantum Mechanics Can Be Formulated Without Imaginary Numbers, Study Suggests
item.description: A groundbreaking study by physicists at Heinrich-Heine University Düsseldorf and other institutions challenges a long-standing assumption in quantum mechanics. Researchers found that complex numbers, ...
